mapper.sql: FROM teacher t INNER JOIN sys_user u ON t.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.teacher_no, u.real_name AS realName, t.department
AND t.department = #{department}
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY t.id DESC

SELECT t.id, t.user_id, t.teacher_no, u.real_name AS realName, t.department, t.create_time
AND t.id = #{id}
SELECT c.name FROM course_teacher ct INNER JOIN course c ON ct.course_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE ct.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY c.id
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM teacher WHERE teacher_no = #{teacherNo}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM teacher WHERE user_id = #{userId}
